extra.reason: Fix confirmed live in run bkcu3tv52: 0 tracebacks since restart, and notworkinmd (no-video stream) now logs the clean 'ERROR: stream has no video track — dropping, rotating.' guard message instead of crashing the worker thread with an uncaught IndexError. Note left for follow-up: notworkinmd is persistently in the top-20 English Apex list and gets re-selected/rotated back to repeatedly — harmless now (graceful) but mild rotation churn; could add it to STREAM_BLOCKLIST if it persists.

Fixed + validated vs vision ground truth. Root cause: detect_kill_skull (ocr.py) had two gates calibrated on 1080p that reject real skulls at 936p: fill ceiling 0.84 (skull renders more solid at 936p, measured 0.88) and ctx_sat ceiling 0.25 (on a bright map the sky bleeds through the translucent strip around the skull, measured 0.42 on the game-winning kill). Fix: fill 0.84->0.92, ctx_sat 0.25->0.45; skull-specific shape/size/pos/orange gates still carry precision. VALIDATED (re-OCR saved crops -> re-parse -> _score_ocr vs vision golden): recall 73%->77%, precision 88->87% (flat; all 6 'spurious' are real-but-unmatched garble, ZERO false knock->kill flips), attacker-accuracy 92->95%. Game-winning kill 'trying to be like rcloudy <KILL_ICON> john redcorn' now captured as Kill. Fast validation loop built: _reocr_crops.py re-OCRs saved crops (no VOD re-decode) then _vod_parse + _score_ocr. UNCOMMITTED (ocr.py).
